message:
fix(backend): SSE goroutine safety, MCP error propagation, notification persistence (#6945-#6956) (#6973)

* fix(sse): goroutine safety, write error handling, and evictor shutdown (#6952-#6956)

- Wait for all cluster goroutines before emitting done event (#6952, #6953)
- Check emitEvent return value in goroutines, skip counter on failure (#6954)
- Check writeSSEEvent errors in streamDemoSSE (#6955)
- Add done channel to cache evictor goroutine for clean shutdown (#6956)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(mcp): propagate per-cluster errors via clusterErrorTracker (#6945-#6948)

- Add clusterErrorTracker to FindPodIssues and FindDeploymentIssues (#6945, #6946)
- Add clusterErrorTracker to 13 handlers in mcp_resources.go (#6947)
- Replace fmt.Printf with slog.Error in MCP client readResponses (#6948)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix(notifications): persist ActionURL, remove unscoped read, check store errors (#6949-#6951)

- Add action_url column to notifications schema, INSERT, SELECT, and migration (#6949)
- Remove MarkNotificationRead from public Store interface (#6950)
- Check all store mutation errors before firing notifications in webhook handlers (#6951)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@ import (
 	"encoding/json"
 	"fmt"
 	"io"
+	"log/slog"
 	"os/exec"
 	"sync"
 	"sync/atomic"
@@ -427,7 +428,7 @@ func (c *Client) readResponses() {
 				case <-c.done:
 					// Client is stopping; suppress read errors
 				default:
-					fmt.Printf("[%s] read error: %v\n", c.name, err)
+					slog.Error("[MCP] read error", "client", c.name, "error", err)
 				}
 			}
 			return

@@ -138,7 +138,9 @@ type Store interface {
 	CreateNotification(notification *models.Notification) error
 	GetUserNotifications(userID uuid.UUID, limit int) ([]models.Notification, error)
 	GetUnreadNotificationCount(userID uuid.UUID) (int, error)
-	MarkNotificationRead(id uuid.UUID) error
+	// MarkNotificationRead was intentionally removed from the public interface
+	// (#6950). The unscoped method allows any user to mark any other user's
+	// notification as read. Use MarkNotificationReadByUser instead.
 	MarkNotificationReadByUser(id uuid.UUID, userID uuid.UUID) error
 	MarkAllNotificationsRead(userID uuid.UUID) error
